metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins by Ant Stanley.

plugins.name: reasoning-semiformally
plugins.description: Apply semi-formal certificate reasoning to code analysis — patch verification, fault localization, patch equivalence.

plugins.name: spec-creator
plugins.description: Create or expand formal design specifications for an app, package, or codebase — numbered, layered, cross-linked markdown.

plugins.name: spec-planner
plugins.description: Plan the implementation of a specification — decompose a spec into a dependency-ordered graph of reviewable task packages, each with a definition of done.

plugins.name: jj-workspaces
plugins.description: jj (jujutsu) workspaces skill for Claude Code — creates isolated workspaces for parallel work and sub-agent driven development, and intercepts git-worktree requests in jj-managed repos.
